zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hill於從1525年到1527年出生在英國薩默塞特朋迪斯福德時，他的父親Roger Hill32歲，母親Margery Toose31歲。他於1544年與Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill在英國英格蘭多瑟特萊 雷吉結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年6月6日在英國薩默塞特陶頓，埋葬在英國薩默塞特陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Hill于从1525年到1527年出生在英国薩默塞特朋迪斯福德时，他的父亲Roger Hill32岁，母亲Margery Toose31岁。他于1544年与Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill在英国英格兰多瑟特萊 雷吉结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年6月6日在英国薩默塞特陶頓，埋葬在英国薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hill was born from 1525 to 1527, in Pondisford, Somerset, England, his father, Roger Hill, was 32 and his mother, Margery Toose, was 31. He married Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill in 1544, in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 6 June 1594, in Taunton, Somerset, England, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hill est né du 1525 au 1527, à Pondisford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Roger Hill, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margery Toose, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill en 1544, à Lyme Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1594, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Hill von 1525 bis 1527 in Pondisford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Hill 32 und seine Mutter Margery Toose 31. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill nel 1544, nel Lyme Regis, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 giugno 1594, nel Taunton, Somerset, England, e fu sepolto a Taunton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Hillがから1525年まで1527年にイギリスソメルセトポンディスフォードで生まれた時，父Roger Hillは32歳，母Margery Tooseは31歳であった。1544年にイギリスイギリスドールセトリメ レジスでLady Agnes Trowbridge Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年6月6日にイギリスソメルセトタウントンで死去し，イギリスソメルセトタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hill(이)가 1525년 부터 1527년 까지 영국 서머세트 폰디스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Hill(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Toose(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 림 레지스에서 Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 6월 6일 영국 서머세트 타운턴에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hill nasceu de 1525 a 1527, em Pondisford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Hill, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margery Toose, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill em 1544, em Lyme Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1594, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hill родился с 1525 по 1527 в местности пондисфорд, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Hill было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Toose, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill в 1544 г. в местности лим регис, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 июня 1594 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия и был похоронен в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия.
